settings.heading: Size Guide
settings.lede: Use this as a starting point for oversized tees, hoodies, shorts, and lowers.

settings.title: Fit note
settings.text: AltInstinct silhouettes are designed with relaxed and oversized energy. Choose your regular size for the intended fit, or size down for a cleaner shape.

settings.title: Need help choosing?
settings.text: Contact support with your height, weight, preferred fit, and product name for guidance before ordering.
